raw_answers.q27:
I don't always upload full chapters at once.
Sometimes I split a chapter into parts (e.g. 40 pages → upload 20 pages as Part 1, then continue later).

So the system should support updating an existing chapter or adding parts progressively without breaking the reading order.
raw_answers.q1-other: I prefer no overlay subtitles. Each language should have its own dedicated version of the pages, keeping the artwork clean and the reading experience intact.
raw_answers.q2-other: Pinch-to-zoom on mobile and iPad with a clean UI (no buttons). On desktop, zoom buttons are fine as long as they stay minimal or auto-hide. Zoom should not interfere with page swiping.
raw_answers.q6-other: I prefer comments to be visible immediately (no pre-approval). Please include moderation tools like reporting, the ability to delete comments, and ban users when needed.
raw_answers.q8-other: Stories may include seasons, so the structure should support: StoryName/Season01/Ch01/
raw_answers.q10-other: I use a mix of PNG and JPEG. It would be ideal if the platform automatically converts and optimizes them to WebP during upload.
raw_answers.q17-other: No visible toggle button. The UI should hide/show with a simple tap on the screen (like Dropbox). Clean, minimal, and immersive
raw_answers.q18-other: The reader should be dark mode only, while the main website stays light mode. No toggle or switching needed.
raw_answers.q21-other: I'll set up Stripe when I'm ready to launch subscriptions
raw_answers.q22-other: I have existing websites and social media accounts that should be integrated

structured_qa.question: Subtitles for translated content — how should they appear?
structured_qa.other_text: I prefer no overlay subtitles. Each language should have its own dedicated version of the pages, keeping the artwork clean and the reading experience intact.

structured_qa.question: Should readers be able to zoom in on pages?
structured_qa.other_text: Pinch-to-zoom on mobile and iPad with a clean UI (no buttons). On desktop, zoom buttons are fine as long as they stay minimal or auto-hide. Zoom should not interfere with page swiping.

structured_qa.question: How many moderators will manage the forum and comments?
What should moderators be able to do without your approval?
Who handles the comment approval queue?
Should forum posts and page comments use the same moderation rules?
structured_qa.other_text: I prefer comments to be visible immediately (no pre-approval). Please include moderation tools like reporting, the ability to delete comments, and ban users when needed.

structured_qa.question: Should there be an audit log visible to you as owner?
How do you currently organize chapter files?
structured_qa.other_text: Stories may include seasons, so the structure should support: StoryName/Season01/Ch01/

structured_qa.question: How do you name individual page files within a chapter?
What file formats are your pages in?
structured_qa.other_text: I use a mix of PNG and JPEG. It would be ideal if the platform automatically converts and optimizes them to WebP during upload.

structured_qa.question: How do you want to upload chapters to the platform?
How should character profiles and world-building documents be uploaded?
Can you share a sample chapter for development testing?
What visual assets can you provide for each story?
Do you have existing brand assets we should use?
What feeling should the landing page evoke?
Should the reader have a theater mode?
structured_qa.other_text: No visible toggle button. The UI should hide/show with a simple tap on the screen (like Dropbox). Clean, minimal, and immersive

structured_qa.question: Should there be a light/dark mode toggle?
structured_qa.other_text: The reader should be dark mode only, while the main website stays light mode. No toggle or switching needed.

structured_qa.question: Do you own restlessworlds.com (or your preferred domain)?
How should the code repository be handled?
What payment processor do you have (or plan to use) for subscriptions?
structured_qa.other_text: I'll set up Stripe when I'm ready to launch subscriptions

structured_qa.question: Do you have existing digital infrastructure we should integrate with?
structured_qa.other_text: I have existing websites and social media accounts that should be integrated

structured_qa.question: What payment schedule works for you?
What's your preferred payment method?
What platforms should we prioritize?
Should we architect for merchandise or store integration later?
Is there anything else we should know?
structured_qa.answer_value:
I don't always upload full chapters at once.
Sometimes I split a chapter into parts (e.g. 40 pages → upload 20 pages as Part 1, then continue later).

So the system should support updating an existing chapter or adding parts progressively without breaking the reading order.
